notes: Toss Product Sans = same custom typeface as toss.im — shared parent-brand asset.
Tossface is Toss's open-source emoji font (GitHub: toss/tossface).
Body default rendered at 16px / 400; data tables and price ticks rely on Latin/numeric balance within Toss Product Sans.
No webfont download observed for primary face on this surface — Toss Product Sans appears via parent-domain CDN inheritance (cross-origin asset).
